FROM "CartItems" AS c
INNER JOIN "Cart" AS c0 ON c."CartId" = c0."CartId"
INNER JOIN "ProductVariant" AS p ON c."ProductVariantId" = p."ProductVariantId"
INNER JOIN "Product" AS p0 ON p."ProductId" = p0."ProductId"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT i."InventoryId", i."AddressId", i."AvailableQuantity", i."IsActive", i."ProductVariantId", i."ReservedQuantity", i."UpdatedAt", a."AddressId" AS "AddressId0", a."AddressLine", a."City", a."ContactName", a."ContactPhoneNumber", a."Country", a."CreatedAt", a."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", a."IsDefault", a."LandMark", a."PinCode", a."State", a."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt0", a."UserId"
    FROM "Inventory" AS i
    INNER JOIN "Address" AS a ON i."AddressId" = a."AddressId"
) AS s ON p."ProductVariantId" = s."ProductVariantId"
WHERE c0."UserId" = @userId
ORDER BY c."CartItemsId", c0."CartId", p."ProductVariantId", p0."ProductId", s."InventoryId"

FROM "CartItems" AS c
INNER JOIN "Cart" AS c0 ON c."CartId" = c0."CartId"
INNER JOIN "ProductVariant" AS p ON c."ProductVariantId" = p."ProductVariantId"
INNER JOIN "Product" AS p0 ON p."ProductId" = p0."ProductId"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT i."InventoryId", i."AddressId", i."AvailableQuantity", i."IsActive", i."ProductVariantId", i."ReservedQuantity", i."UpdatedAt", a."AddressId" AS "AddressId0", a."AddressLine", a."City", a."ContactName", a."ContactPhoneNumber", a."Country", a."CreatedAt", a."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", a."IsDefault", a."LandMark", a."PinCode", a."State", a."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt0", a."UserId"

) AS s ON p."ProductVariantId" = s."ProductVariantId"
WHERE c0."UserId" = @userId

2026-06-10 16:11:03.960 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (5ms) [Parameters=[@userId='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT c."CartItemsId", c."CartId", c."ProductVariantId", c."Qunatity", c0."CartId", c0."UserId", p."ProductVariantId", p."AddedByVendorUserId", p."CreatedAt", p."HeightInCm", p."IsExchange", p."IsReturn", p."LengthInCm", p."MainProductSubCategoryAttributeId", p."MinimuQuantityPerUser", p."Price", p."ProductApprovalStatusId", p."ProductId", p."ProductVariantStatusId", p."SKU", p."UpdatedAt", p."WeightInKgs", p."WidthInCm", p0."ProductId", p0."AddedByVendorUserId", p0."CreatedAt", p0."Description", p0."ProductApprovalStatusId", p0."ProductName", p0."ProductStatusId", p0."ProductSubCategoryId", p0."UpdatedAt", p0."VendorId", s."InventoryId", s."AddressId", s."AvailableQuantity", s."IsActive", s."ProductVariantId", s."ReservedQuantity", s."UpdatedAt", s."AddressId0", s."AddressLine", s."City", s."ContactName", s."ContactPhoneNumber", s."Country", s."CreatedAt", s."IsActive0", s."IsDefault", s."LandMark", s."PinCode", s."State", s."UpdatedAt0", s."UserId"
FROM "CartItems" AS c
INNER JOIN "Cart" AS c0 ON c."CartId" = c0."CartId"
INNER JOIN "ProductVariant" AS p ON c."ProductVariantId" = p."ProductVariantId"
INNER JOIN "Product" AS p0 ON p."ProductId" = p0."ProductId"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT i."InventoryId", i."AddressId", i."AvailableQuantity", i."IsActive", i."ProductVariantId", i."ReservedQuantity", i."UpdatedAt", a."AddressId" AS "AddressId0", a."AddressLine", a."City", a."ContactName", a."ContactPhoneNumber", a."Country", a."CreatedAt", a."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", a."IsDefault", a."LandMark", a."PinCode", a."State", a."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt0", a."UserId"
    FROM "Inventory" AS i
    INNER JOIN "Address" AS a ON i."AddressId" = a."AddressId"
) AS s ON p."ProductVariantId" = s."ProductVariantId"
WHERE c0."UserId" = @userId
ORDER BY c."CartItemsId", c0."CartId", p."ProductVariantId", p0."ProductId", s."InventoryId"

    SELECT s."ShipmentId", s."CreatedAt", s."DeliveryDate", s."ExpectedDeliveryDate", s."OrderId", s."PickupAddressId", s."ShipmentStatusId", s."ShippedDate", s."ShipperId", s."ShippingCharge", s."TrackingNumber", s1."ShipmentStatusId" AS "ShipmentStatusId0", s1."ShipmentStatusName"
    FROM "Shipment" AS s
    INNER JOIN "ShipmentStatus" AS s1 ON s."ShipmentStatusId" = s1."ShipmentStatusId"
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "ShipmentItems" AS s0
        WHERE s."ShipmentId" = s0."ShipmentId" AND s0."OrderItemsId" = @orderitemid)
    LIMIT 1
) AS s3
LEFT JOIN "ShipmentItems" AS s2 ON s3."ShipmentId" = s2."ShipmentId"
ORDER BY s3."ShipmentId", s3."ShipmentStatusId0"

    LEFT JOIN "Inventory" AS i ON p5."ProductVariantId" = i."ProductVariantId"
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p7."ProductVariantAttributeId", p7."AddedByVendorUserId", p7."AttributeValue", p7."CreatedAt", p7."IsActive", p7."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId", p7."ProductVariantId", p7."UpdatedAt", p8."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId" AS "ProductSubCategoryAttributeId0", p8."AddedByAdminId", p8."AttributeMasterId", p8."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", p8."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", p8."ProductSubCategoryId", a0."AttributeMasterId" AS "AttributeMasterId0", a0."AddedByAdminId" AS "AddedByAdminId0", a0."AttributeName", a0."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt1", a0."IsActive" AS "IsActive1"
        FROM "ProductVariantAttribute" AS p7
        INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategoryAttribute" AS p8 ON p7."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId" = p8."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId"
        INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a0 ON p8."AttributeMasterId" = a0."AttributeMasterId"
    ) AS s ON p5."ProductVariantId" = s."ProductVariantId"
    LEFT JOIN "ProductImage" AS p9 ON p5."ProductVariantId" = p9."ProductVariantId"
) AS s0 ON p."ProductId" = s0."ProductId"
